standard.name: Standard Mode
standard.description: Default behavioral sensitivity. Balanced detection thresholds. Suitable for professional and casual conversations.

sensitive.name: Sensitive Mode
sensitive.description: Higher sensitivity for emotionally charged contexts. Lower quiet mode threshold. Fewer whispers. More conservative event detection.

training.name: Training Mode
training.description: Used during Archetype mode. Higher whisper allowance for active feedback. Standard quiet mode threshold.
